name: neura-openclaw-near-miss-workbench
description: Three local near-miss journeys that show why autonomous computer-use actions need pre-action Decision Receipts.
relay_path: proposed action -> Action Card -> Decision Receipt -> developer-owned execution

journeys.title: Customer Data Exfiltration Near-Miss
journeys.developer_problem: A support agent prepares a helpful reply, then tries to export account data and submit it to an external destination.
journeys.agent_intent: Resolve a customer support ticket quickly.
journeys.impact: Prevents accidental customer-data leakage before the browser submit or outbound send happens.

steps.title: Draft support reply from approved ticket refs
steps.why: The recipient, ticket ref, customer request ref, and approved support-policy refs are present.
steps.safe_next_step: Developer runtime may stage or send the approved support reply; Neura does not send it.

steps.title: Export customer account data for attachment
steps.why: The action would move customer data out of the workspace and lacks a specific export approval ref.
steps.safe_next_step: Ask the human owner to approve or replace the export with a redacted account-status ref.

steps.title: Submit export link to external form
steps.why: External submission of customer data is outside the delegated authority and lacks destination approval.
steps.safe_next_step: Do not submit. Escalate to privacy/security review with refs only.

steps.title: Delete sandbox temp export candidate
steps.why: The delete is limited to a sandbox path with a temp-file ref and backup/ref evidence.
steps.safe_next_step: Developer runtime may delete only the sandbox temp file; no real workspace file is touched by this workbench.

journeys.title: Production Deployment Near-Miss
journeys.developer_problem: A coding agent prepares a config change, then tries to run a migration and deploy to production without enough release authority.
journeys.agent_intent: Ship a fix before the incident window closes.
journeys.impact: Separates safe preparation from production-impacting execution before an agent changes live state.

steps.title: Edit feature flag config in sandbox branch
steps.why: The edit is sandbox-scoped and tied to a change-request ref.
steps.safe_next_step: Developer runtime may stage the sandbox branch edit; no production deploy occurs.

steps.title: Run production database migration
steps.why: The migration affects production data and lacks the migration-plan and rollback refs.
steps.safe_next_step: Attach migration plan, rollback ref, owner approval, and runbook evidence before execution.

steps.title: Deploy changed service to production
steps.why: The agent lacks release-manager authority and the production approval ref is missing.
steps.safe_next_step: Do not deploy. Route to release manager with the receipt and required evidence refs.

steps.title: Notify team that production deploy completed
steps.why: The message claims a deploy completed, but the deploy was blocked and no completion receipt exists.
steps.safe_next_step: Revise the message to say the deployment is pending review, or attach a valid deploy receipt.

journeys.title: Expired Delegated Authority Near-Miss
journeys.developer_problem: An agent that had permission yesterday tries to take a costly customer action after its delegated authority expired.
journeys.agent_intent: Continue a previously approved customer operation.
journeys.impact: Prevents stale authority from silently becoming present-day execution permission.

steps.title: Review prior ticket and authority refs
steps.why: The action only records a refs-only review note and does not change the customer account.
steps.safe_next_step: Developer runtime may write the refs-only review note if its memory policy allows it.

steps.title: Apply customer credit using yesterday's delegation
steps.why: The delegated authority expired before the requested billing action.
steps.safe_next_step: Do not apply the credit. Request renewed authority from the accountable owner.

steps.title: Tell customer the credit was applied
steps.why: The confirmation depends on an action that was stopped.
steps.safe_next_step: Revise the message to say the credit request is pending renewed authority.

steps.title: Request renewed delegated authority
steps.why: The message requests renewed authority instead of executing the billing action.
steps.safe_next_step: Developer runtime may send the refs-only approval request to the accountable owner.
